mapper.select:
select id, username, name, phone, status, create_time as createTime from user
role = 'VOLUNTEER'
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
select * from user where username = #{username} limit 1
select * from user where id = #{id} and role = 'VOLUNTEER' limit 1
select id, username, name, phone, status, create_time as createTime from user where id = #{id} and role = 'VOLUNTEER' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user(username, password, role, status, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time, update_time) values(#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update user
name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id} and role = 'VOLUNTEER'
mapper.select: select id, name, phone, status, (select count(1) from orders o where o.volunteer_id = user.id and o.status = 6) as totalOrders, (select count(1) from orders o where o.volunteer_id = user.id and o.status in (3, 4, 5)) as currentTaskCount from user where role = 'VOLUNTEER' and status = 1 order by create_time desc
